markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on the current state and next steps for the Lovable template library project.](https://fathom.video/share/vWSe7ZDXRLyLA3xcbHBUCZtoDdZX7o2f?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Project communication and alignment issues have led to confusion about current progress and deliverables](https://fathom.video/share/vWSe7ZDXRLyLA3xcbHBUCZtoDdZX7o2f?tab=summary&timestamp=201.0)
  - [The team needs to prioritize launching a functional template gallery experience within 4 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/vWSe7ZDXRLyLA3xcbHBUCZtoDdZX7o2f?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Focus should shift from perfecting individual templates to creating a working gallery MVP that can be improved iteratively](https://fathom.video/share/vWSe7ZDXRLyLA3xcbHBUCZtoDdZX7o2f?tab=summary&timestamp=1160.0)
  - [Cece (client-side) is supportive of the team's direction, superseding Sebastian's concerns about template quality](https://fathom.video/share/vWSe7ZDXRLyLA3xcbHBUCZtoDdZX7o2f?tab=summary&timestamp=1287.0)

## Topics

### Project Status and Confusion

  - [Multiple versions exist: Marcel's prototype, Nico's render preview, Georgemaine's Figma/Origami designs](https://fathom.video/share/vWSe7ZDXRLyLA3xcbHBUCZtoDdZX7o2f?tab=summary&timestamp=793.0)
  - [Lack of clear communication on what was shown to the client (Felix/Sebastian)](https://fathom.video/share/vWSe7ZDXRLyLA3xcbHBUCZtoDdZX7o2f?tab=summary&timestamp=401.0)
  - [Uncertainty about which version to proceed with and show to the client](https://fathom.video/share/vWSe7ZDXRLyLA3xcbHBUCZtoDdZX7o2f?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)

### Prioritizing MVP Launch

  - [4 weeks remaining before potential project end](https://fathom.video/share/vWSe7ZDXRLyLA3xcbHBUCZtoDdZX7o2f?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Need to show tangible progress to the client immediately](https://fathom.video/share/vWSe7ZDXRLyLA3xcbHBUCZtoDdZX7o2f?tab=summary&timestamp=1052.0)
  - [Focus on launching a functional template gallery, even if not perfect](https://fathom.video/share/vWSe7ZDXRLyLA3xcbHBUCZtoDdZX7o2f?tab=summary&timestamp=1160.0)
  - [Emphasis on having something deployable over perfecting individual templates](https://fathom.video/share/vWSe7ZDXRLyLA3xcbHBUCZtoDdZX7o2f?tab=summary&timestamp=1160.0)

### Template Quality Concerns

  - [Sebastian (client-side) raised concerns about template quality](https://fathom.video/share/vWSe7ZDXRLyLA3xcbHBUCZtoDdZX7o2f?tab=summary&timestamp=881.0)
  - [Team decides to proceed with gallery development, addressing template quality iteratively](https://fathom.video/share/vWSe7ZDXRLyLA3xcbHBUCZtoDdZX7o2f?tab=summary&timestamp=1245.0)
  - [Cece (client-side) supports the team's direction, bypassing Sebastian's feedback](https://fathom.video/share/vWSe7ZDXRLyLA3xcbHBUCZtoDdZX7o2f?tab=summary&timestamp=1287.0)

### Technical Approach

  - [Nico has a working render preview with login functionality](https://fathom.video/share/vWSe7ZDXRLyLA3xcbHBUCZtoDdZX7o2f?tab=summary&timestamp=993.0)
  - [Georgemaine created designs in Figma and prototypes in Origami](https://fathom.video/share/vWSe7ZDXRLyLA3xcbHBUCZtoDdZX7o2f?tab=summary&timestamp=1087.0)
  - [Decision to adapt existing work rather than building something substantially different](https://fathom.video/share/vWSe7ZDXRLyLA3xcbHBUCZtoDdZX7o2f?tab=summary&timestamp=1160.0)
  - [Plan to improve look and feel after initial launch](https://fathom.video/share/vWSe7ZDXRLyLA3xcbHBUCZtoDdZX7o2f?tab=summary&timestamp=1160.0)

### SEO Considerations

  - [Goal to optimize for search queries like "construction website examples"](https://fathom.video/share/vWSe7ZDXRLyLA3xcbHBUCZtoDdZX7o2f?tab=summary&timestamp=1459.0)
  - [Focus on creating filter landing pages similar to competitors (e.g., Wix)](https://fathom.video/share/vWSe7ZDXRLyLA3xcbHBUCZtoDdZX7o2f?tab=summary&timestamp=1459.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Nico to share the link to the render preview version in Slack](https://fathom.video/share/vWSe7ZDXRLyLA3xcbHBUCZtoDdZX7o2f?tab=summary&timestamp=1413.0)
  - [Georgemaine to shift focus from individual templates to gallery experience](https://fathom.video/share/vWSe7ZDXRLyLA3xcbHBUCZtoDdZX7o2f?tab=summary&timestamp=1310.0)
  - [Team to simplify and re-skin existing prototype to align more with Lovable branding](https://fathom.video/share/vWSe7ZDXRLyLA3xcbHBUCZtoDdZX7o2f?tab=summary&timestamp=1413.0)
  - [Marcel to clear calendar and reconvene with the team to further align on approach](https://fathom.video/share/vWSe7ZDXRLyLA3xcbHBUCZtoDdZX7o2f?tab=summary&timestamp=1534.0)
  - [Continue posting updates in the project channel for better communication](https://fathom.video/share/vWSe7ZDXRLyLA3xcbHBUCZtoDdZX7o2f?tab=summary&timestamp=1548.0)
